languages.text: "Еретики нарекли себя Алой Дланью — живым воплощением карающего орудия божьего. Отчаяние и голод исказили умы культистов, ибо веруют они, что смогут обрясть частицу Его бессмертия, пожирая плоть детей Императора. Как веруют они и в то, что обретает Он свое бессмертие, пожирая их души".

traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "The heretics are calling themselves the Crimson Hand — a living embodiment of divine punishment. Despair and hunger twisted the cultists' minds, for they believe they can obtain a mote of His immortality by devouring flesh of His loyal children... Just like they think He sustains his immortality by feasting on their souls."

languages.text: "Die Ketzer nennen sich selbst die Rote Hand — eine lebende Verkörperung der göttlichen Strafe. Verzweiflung und Hunger verdrehten den Geist der Kultisten, denn sie glauben, dass sie ein Stück Seiner Unsterblichkeit erlangen können, indem sie das Fleisch Seiner treuen Kinder verschlingen... Genauso wie sie glauben, dass er seine Unsterblichkeit erhält, indem er sich an ihren Seelen labt."
languages.original_text: "The heretics are calling themselves the Crimson Hand — a living embodiment of divine punishment. Despair and hunger twisted the cultists' minds, for they believe they can obtain a mote of His immortality by devouring flesh of His loyal children... Just like they think He sustains his immortality by feasting on their souls."

languages.text: "Les hérétiques se font appeler la Main Cramoisie, incarnation vivante du châtiment divin. Le désespoir et la faim ont tordu l'esprit des sectaires, car ils croient pouvoir obtenir une parcelle de son immortalité en dévorant la chair de ses enfants loyaux... Tout comme ils pensent qu'il entretient son immortalité en se régalant de leurs âmes."
languages.original_text: "The heretics are calling themselves the Crimson Hand — a living embodiment of divine punishment. Despair and hunger twisted the cultists' minds, for they believe they can obtain a mote of His immortality by devouring flesh of His loyal children... Just like they think He sustains his immortality by feasting on their souls."

languages.text: "异教徒自称'绯红之手'--神罚的活化石。绝望和饥饿扭曲了邪教徒的心灵，因为他们相信，通过吞食神的忠实子民的肉体，他们可以获得神的一丝不朽......就像他们认为祂可以通过吞噬他们的灵魂 来维持祂的不朽一样"
languages.original_text: "The heretics are calling themselves the Crimson Hand — a living embodiment of divine punishment. Despair and hunger twisted the cultists' minds, for they believe they can obtain a mote of His immortality by devouring flesh of His loyal children... Just like they think He sustains his immortality by feasting on their souls."

languages.text: "Los herejes se hacen llamar la Mano Carmesí, encarnación viviente del castigo divino. La desesperación y el hambre retorcieron las mentes de los cultistas, pues creen que pueden obtener una mota de Su inmortalidad devorando carne de Sus hijos leales... Igual que creen que Él mantiene su inmortalidad dándose un festín con sus almas".
languages.original_text: "The heretics are calling themselves the Crimson Hand — a living embodiment of divine punishment. Despair and hunger twisted the cultists' minds, for they believe they can obtain a mote of His immortality by devouring flesh of His loyal children... Just like they think He sustains his immortality by feasting on their souls."

languages.text: "異端者たちは自らをクリムゾン・ハンドと呼んでいる。絶望と飢えが教団員たちの心をねじ曲げた。彼らは、神の忠実な子供たちの肉をむさぼることで、神の不死の一片を手に入れることができると信じているからだ...。彼らの魂を貪ることで、不死を維持できると信じているのだ。"
languages.original_text: "The heretics are calling themselves the Crimson Hand — a living embodiment of divine punishment. Despair and hunger twisted the cultists' minds, for they believe they can obtain a mote of His immortality by devouring flesh of His loyal children... Just like they think He sustains his immortality by feasting on their souls."

languages.text: "Sapkınlar kendilerini Kızıl El olarak adlandırıyorlar — ilahi cezanın canlı bir örneği. Umutsuzluk ve açlık tarikatçıların aklını karıştırdı, çünkü O'nun sadık çocuklarının etini yiyerek O'nun ölümsüzlüğünden bir zerre elde edebileceklerine inanıyorlar... Tıpkı onların ruhlarıyla ziyafet çekerek ölümsüzlüğünü sürdürdüğünü düşündükleri gibi."
languages.original_text: "The heretics are calling themselves the Crimson Hand — a living embodiment of divine punishment. Despair and hunger twisted the cultists' minds, for they believe they can obtain a mote of His immortality by devouring flesh of His loyal children... Just like they think He sustains his immortality by feasting on their souls."
